zh.lifeSummary: 當Harold de Sudeley於大約1057年出生在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德時，他的父親Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford33歲，母親Gytha Countess of Hereford32歲。他於1089年與Maud d'Chester在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1115年12月21日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾文可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Harold de Sudeley于大约1057年出生在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德时，他的父亲Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford33岁，母亲Gytha Countess of Hereford32岁。他于1089年与Maud d'Chester在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1115年12月21日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾文可姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sudeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Sudeley (Gloucs) or Soudley in East Dean (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: Harold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from here ‘army’ + weald ‘ruler’. In pre-Conquest England, this was reinforced by the related Old Norse name Haraldr, introduced by Scandinavian settlers. The name was not at all popular in England after the Conquest, probably because of its association with the unfortunate King Harold , killed at the Battle of Hastings in 1066 . It was used in some parts of Nottinghamshire in the 16th and 17th centuries, and revived more generally, along with a number of other Old English names, in the 19th century, when it suddenly became extremely popular.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Harold de Sudeley was born about 1057, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, his father, Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford, was 33 and his mother, Gytha Countess of Hereford, was 32. He married Maud d'Chester in 1089, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died on 21 December 1115, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Harold de Sudeley est né environ 1057, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Gytha Countess of Hereford, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Maud d'Chester en 1089, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1115, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Harold de Sudeley um 1057 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford 33 und seine Mutter Gytha Countess of Hereford 32. Er hat 1089 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England Maud d'Chester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1115 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Harold de Sudeley è nato il circa 1057 nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Gytha Countess of Hereford, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Maud d'Chester nel 1089, nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì il 21 dicembre 1115, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Harold de Sudeleyが約1057年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで生まれた時，父Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Herefordは33歳，母Gytha Countess of Herefordは32歳であった。1089年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーでMaud d'Chesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1115年12月21日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアウィンチコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Harold de Sudeley(이)가 대략 1057년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Gytha Countess of Hereford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1089년 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 Maud d'Chester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1115년 12월 21일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 윈ch코브에 묻혔다.

mn.Sudeley Castle, Gloucestershire, England: Sudeley, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Exning, Suffolk, England: Exning, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Harold de Sudeley nasceu aproximadamente 1057, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Gytha Countess of Hereford, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud d'Chester em 1089, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1115, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Harold de Sudeley родился около 1057 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Gytha Countess of Hereford, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud d'Chester в 1089 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер 21 декабря 1115 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности винчкомб, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Harold de Sudeley nació aproximadamente 1057, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Raoul de Mantes, Earl of Hereford, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Gytha Countess of Hereford, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Maud d'Chester en 1089, en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1115, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Winchcombe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
